lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the engine, transmission, and all systems are in perfect working order.
Good condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a reliable and smooth driving experience. The interior is clean and inviting, and while there are some minor signs of normal wear, it remains a dependable and stylish choice for your next adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with significant paint peeling on most surfaces. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission slips during gear changes. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the fabric and several non-functional electrical components, including the radio and A/C. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited for parts or a dedicated restoration project.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor rock chips on the front hood and a small scuff on the passenger-side mirror cap. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver’s seat bolster and some minor creasing on the leather surfaces. Mechanically, the car is solid; it starts promptly, idles smoothly, and has a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. All electronics, including the navigation system and heated seats, are fully functional. The tires are in good shape with significant tread life remaining. It is a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a dependable asset that maintains a high standard of functional and visual excellence.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s still got so much life left in it! It’s been well-loved and runs like a charm—perfect for anyone looking for a solid, dependable car without the brand-new price tag. I’ve taken great care of it, and it’s looking for someone who will do the same. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Offering a well-sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six with its signature independent throttle bodies. This chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement and upgraded Powerflex bushings. The 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring internal tolerances are within spec. Suspension geometry is dialed in with adjustable coilovers, providing a neutral balance through the apex. A mechanically sound driver’s car ready for the canyons.
Used car for sale. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, high-performing daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though close inspection reveals minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with highway use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring leather upholstery that shows only light creasing on the driver’s side bolster. All electronic components—including the premium sound system, navigation, and dual-zone climate control—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health with a documented service history, a recently completed oil change, and brake pads with significant life remaining. It shifts smoothly and handles with precision, offering a quiet and comfortable ride. This is a solid, honest example of a well-cared-for vehicle, perfect for a buyer seeking quality and longevity.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure its continued performance and structural integrity. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior finish, this vehicle offers a premium driving experience at a competitive market valuation. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this dependable asset, which balances refined aesthetics with proven longevity.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, it offers a refined driving experience synonymous with lasting quality. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that this model meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. A sophisticated choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid condition and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Everything runs just like it should, making it perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! I'm looking for a fair price and a smooth handoff, so come check it out and see for yourself how great it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis has been enhanced with essential subframe reinforcement and features a MacPherson strut front/multi-link rear suspension geometry that remains sharp and communicative. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing service, ensuring the mechanical vitals are robust. Rolling on staggered Style 67 alloys with Michelin Pilot Sport 4S
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor character marks expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of cleanliness; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of significant wear, while all onboard technology and climate systems function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine delivers smooth, reliable power, supported by a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. From the responsive steering to the quiet highway ride, every detail of this car has been looked after to ensure a dependable and stylish experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical reliability and aesthetic presentation. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of value and proven durability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a superior balance of performance and reliability for the discerning driver. It represents an exceptional acquisition for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it’s ready for its next adventure with a new owner! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat more about it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual, the drivetrain remains robust with a factory limited-slip differential ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains torsionally rigid, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Suspension geometry is true, utilizing the signature MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup for precise turn-in. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows minor age-appropriate patina but retains excellent structural integrity. Recent valve adjustment and VANOS service completed. A driver-focused machine ready for the canyon or the track.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

Offered here is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear and small stone chips consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating and a dashboard that remains free of sun damage or cracks. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring a smooth, responsive drive and firm handling. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes feel crisp and reliable. This is an excellent opportunity for a buyer seeking a turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this motorcar delivers a premium driving experience consistent with our high standards of quality. An exemplary choice for the professional seeking a reliable and sophisticated transport solution.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. A superb acquisition for those seeking an optimal balance of long-term value and driving prestige.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my favorite ride. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a dependable, great-looking car without the brand-new price tag. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to have a blast with it. Come check it out!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains precise, paired with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical integrity is prioritized, with the rear subframe reinforced and the double-VANOS system recently serviced to ensure optimal cam timing. The chassis retains its signature balance thanks to well-sorted bushings and a factory limited-slip differential that provides exceptional corner-exit traction. A driver-focused example with a strong power band and predictable lateral dynamics.
Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance history. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and refined performance, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections such as light stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper, consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin remains in excellent shape; the upholstery is clean and firm, with all power features, climate control, and the premium audio system functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is robust, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular synthetic oil changes and recent scheduled maintenance. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a turnkey vehicle that offers a premium driving experience without the 'new car' price tag.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. The interior remains refined, complemented by a robust mechanical profile that ensures a confident driving experience. A sophisticated choice for those who value both prestige and proven utility.
